intro: AccountCcy.com may be considered for strategic acquisition only where an institutional buyer understands the asset as a governed reference system for enterprise finance, not as commodity domain inventory.
acquisition_doctrine: The buyer is not acquiring a page. The buyer is acquiring a category-positioned reference asset around account currency control, currency-state governance, and the chain of custody for monetary truth.
asset_included_title: The asset is structured as category infrastructure.
asset_included_body: AccountCcy.com combines a precise domain, original doctrine, a published CCY State Chain, a Currency State Control Framework, a controlled glossary, reference pages, quality gates, and a diagnostic layer.

The acquisition logic is strongest for organizations that already serve controllers, CFO teams, ERP architects, close operations, treasury-accounting alignment, audit technology, or enterprise finance education.
No acquisition language should weaken the asset. The public posture remains restrained, institutional, and non-urgent.

asset_included_cards.label: Domain thesis
asset_included_cards.title: A name attached to a precise control category.
asset_included_cards.body: AccountCcy is positioned around account currency control rather than generic multi-currency content.

asset_included_cards.label: Reference system
asset_included_cards.title: Doctrine, framework, glossary, and state chain.
asset_included_cards.body: The asset owns a vocabulary for monetary truth custody across enterprise finance systems.

asset_included_cards.label: Operational layer
asset_included_cards.title: Diagnostic surface and future report path.
asset_included_cards.body: The diagnostic converts the thesis into a structured maturity output without cheapening authority.

asset_included_cards.label: SEO discipline
asset_included_cards.title: Professional intent, not mass-market traffic.
asset_included_cards.body: Published pages target definition, framework, ERP control, close, reporting, and audit use cases.

asset_included_cards.label: Governance
asset_included_cards.title: Quality gates protect credibility.
asset_included_cards.body: The asset rejects unsupported claims, vendor affiliation confusion, weak monetization, and temporary filler pages.

asset_included_cards.label: Buyer logic
asset_included_cards.title: Harder to replicate than an isolated tool.
asset_included_cards.body: A buyer can build a feature; it is harder to build the same name, language, internal graph, and accumulated authority.

buyer_title: Aligned buyers are those who benefit from owning the vocabulary.
buyer_intro: Strategic fit matters more than broad interest. AccountCcy.com is best matched with organizations that can extend the framework into trusted software, advisory, education, reporting, assurance, or finance transformation workflows.

buyer_cards.label: ERP and finance systems
buyer_cards.title: Configuration and control context.
buyer_cards.body: ERP vendors, implementation partners, and finance-system platforms can use the asset to frame account currency discipline.

buyer_cards.label: Close and reconciliation platforms
buyer_cards.title: Evidence and workflow extension.
buyer_cards.body: Financial close and reconciliation tools can connect currency-state custody to operational assurance.

buyer_cards.label: Advisory and training firms
buyer_cards.title: Methodology and education layer.
buyer_cards.body: CFO advisory, accounting transformation, and enterprise finance education providers can license or acquire a controlled reference language.

inquiry_title: Inquiry requires context, seriousness, and institutional alignment.
inquiry_body: A credible inquiry should identify the organization, intended strategic use, relationship to enterprise finance, and whether the interest concerns acquisition, licensing, partnership, or a governed commercial discussion. No public price anchoring is provided.
